command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute SHOW CREATE TABLE blog_categories;
stdout:
Table	Create Table
blog_categories	CREATE TABLE `blog_categories` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `name` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `slug` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `description` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `sortOrder` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `createdAt` bigint(20) NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  UNIQUE KEY `blog_categories_slug_unique` (`slug`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_bin
